existingSeedKnowledgeBase.purpose: Existing foundational repo knowledge base already mapped to domain packs.

knowledgeBases.name: Repo Authority & Contracts
knowledgeBases.purpose: Schemas, charters, ADRs, runbooks, imported packets, current-task continuity, operator surface contracts.

knowledgeBases.name: Operator Surface Runtime Projections
knowledgeBases.purpose: Workspace targets, context carts, refinement sessions, visual artifacts, planning board, session board, graph and pipeline projections.

knowledgeBases.name: UI/UX Standards — Web, iOS, Android
knowledgeBases.purpose: Official platform guidance for navigation, motion, toggles, accessibility, and cross-platform adaptation.

knowledgeBases.name: Visualization Pattern Library
knowledgeBases.purpose: Maps problem types to graphs, boards, timelines, diffs, inspectors, chat, evidence drawers, and saved views.

knowledgeBases.name: User Task & Decision Corpus
knowledgeBases.purpose: Operator JTBD, decision timing, failure modes, quick actions, and drill-down patterns.

knowledgeBases.name: Telemetry, Evidence & Learning
knowledgeBases.purpose: Run timelines, evidence bundles, verifier posture, logs references, and fix-memory records for UX learning loops.

knowledgeBases.name: Platform Adaptation
knowledgeBases.purpose: Shared object model plus web/desktop, iOS, and Android-specific capability split.
